summary: Synchronized the M7 strategic decision surface across task cards, map selection metadata, district list focus state, and the right inspector using a UI-only derived decision focus. Map legend entries now expose only stage-relevant overlays by default and use player-facing language for current focus, supply paths, obligation pressure, risk areas, blocked paths, and settlements. Focused Playwright coverage now proves obligations, appointments, and campaign task-card entry points keep map/list/inspector action and active-object state aligned while hiding irrelevant overlays and debug/read-model wording from the player legend.

decisions.decision: Added a client-only derived decision focus in packages/ui that combines the selected read-model object, active task drawer, existing map mode, and command/query status; it does not introduce or mutate authoritative WorldState.
Task rail, map surface, right inspector, route queue, and selected district rows now expose the same current action and active object so task-card, map, list, and inspector entry points stay aligned.
Map legend tones are filtered by active task and user-selected map mode, so route, obligation, risk, focus, settlement, and blocked overlays appear only when relevant or explicitly requested.
Legend copy was changed from engineering-style labels to player-facing meanings such as current focus, supply path, obligation pressure, risk area, blocked path, and settlement.
The UI continues to consume existing client read-model slices and command/query outcomes only; no sim-core, protocol, save-format, Electron, server, content-source, or platform files were touched.

risks.summary: The map is still a low-fidelity strategic surface, but the visible legend and overlay filtering now make it read as a decision map instead of a debug diagram.

The district route queue remains mounted in a folded state outside the obligations drawer so list focus can stay synchronized across appointment and campaign task-card entry points; reviewer should confirm this is acceptable for the intended interaction model.

requested_action: Please review M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 for architecture and protocol-boundary fit, especially that the decision focus remains a UI read-model projection and that task-card/map/list/inspector synchronization does not create new authoritative client state. After architecture review, route to test_engineer and qa_reviewer; add security_reviewer only if Electron risk is identified.
